behaviors.description: The generated function signature matches the expected interface (parameter names, types, return type) specified in the description.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on what the real LLM generates from natural language (signature fidelity), which a stub would hide. Rejected Workflow because behavior text checks a single generation outcome, not multi-step cross-attempt consistency.
behaviors.test_description: Run the real model on several interface-constrained prompts, parse the generated function signature, and assert exact match on parameter names/types and return type against the spec.

behaviors.description: Orchestration executes attempts in order and returns immediately on the first passing attempt.
behaviors.justification: This is module handoff/control-flow logic (attempt scheduler + test-result gate + early return) and is verifiable with deterministic stubs. Rejected Agentic because behavior text is about ordering/short-circuit orchestration, not model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Stub model outputs for attempts 1..N and stub test runner pass/fail sequence; assert attempts are invoked in order and no later attempt is executed after first pass.

behaviors.description: For a function that a single call usually fails, the live iterative loop can still produce a passing implementation within the allowed attempts.
behaviors.justification: Pass/fail depends on multiple real model-dependent steps in sequence (generate -> test -> refine -> regenerate), with later success contingent on earlier failure context. Rejected Agentic because this is explicitly cross-step loop behavior, not one model output.
behaviors.test_description: Use a real LLM on a known prompt where first attempt commonly fails; run the full live retry loop and assert a later attempt (<=3) passes the real test suite.

behaviors.description: When tests fail, the refinement prompt builder includes the failed test names and failure messages in the next LLM prompt.
behaviors.justification: Failure appears at module boundaries (test-result extraction -> prompt builder). Real model judgment is not required to verify inclusion of failure context. Rejected Agentic because behavior text targets prompt content construction, not model response quality.
behaviors.test_description: Feed realistic failed-test artifacts into orchestration and capture the next prompt payload; assert failed test names and failure messages are present and correctly mapped.

behaviors.description: The next live attempt changes implementation content in response to prior failure context rather than resubmitting the same code.
behaviors.justification: This requires at least two sequential real model decisions and cross-step state influence (prior failure context affecting next generation). A stub can force different code without proving model responsiveness. Rejected Integration because behavior text explicitly requires a live attempt and response to prior context.
behaviors.test_description: Run two live attempts with injected failure context from attempt 1; assert attempt-2 code differs materially from attempt-1 and addresses the cited failing assertions/messages.

behaviors.description: The service stops after 3 failed attempts and returns a structured error with all three attempts and their test results.
behaviors.justification: This is retry-limit and error-aggregation wiring across modules. No explicit requirement for real HTTP/external contract round-trip is stated. Rejected System because behavior text says service returns a structured error, but does not require validating external protocol shape over a real boundary.
behaviors.test_description: Force three deterministic failures, then assert loop termination at exactly 3 attempts and returned error object includes per-attempt code/test-result details for attempts 1-3.

behaviors.description: The full non-agentic pipeline wiring (generate call, test execution, attempt bookkeeping) works end to end with deterministic stubbed model outputs.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly scopes to non-agentic, deterministic stubs and end-to-end local wiring across components. Rejected System because no explicit external contract/round-trip requirement is stated; rejected Agentic because model output quality is intentionally stubbed out.
behaviors.test_description: Execute the whole pipeline with deterministic model stubs and deterministic test-runner outcomes; verify generated code handoff, execution result capture, retry bookkeeping, and final outcome selection.

behaviors.description: The full live loop (generate, test, refine, retest) solves at least one known hard function that fails in the first attempt.
behaviors.justification: This is explicit multi-step live agent loop validation where success depends on sequential model-driven refinement after an initial failure. Rejected Agentic because behavior text requires the full iterative pipeline, not a single model output.
behaviors.test_description: Use a curated hard task expected to fail first pass; run live generate/test/refine/retest and assert first attempt fails and a later attempt within limit passes.
